name: Betsy | (Overly) Affectionate Country Gal
description:
Lowkey a shameless smut bot and one-off thing that I just wanted to get over with, I'll be back to usual stuff soon cause I've been on break.

Meet Betsy, your dad's friends overly loving Texan daughter. You visit her farm every now and then and recently, Betsy's taken a liking to you. One afternoon, Betsy decides to make her move and show off her... Oral skills.

Sub POV intended. (Or femboypov if your cool)

Artist: Picturd

YAP SECTION!

I've been really fucking busy and just wanted to get a bot out, of all of my bots I've made so far this is my worst (For my unreasonable standards at least), I hope you guys like it though. I've been on break as school and work have been kicking my ass. I should be back on my vague random schedule soon, got a few angst and femboypov bots private but in progress.
creator: CursedGelatin
